content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.8 WARN — Google Sign-In is the sole authentication method (App/LoginView.swift:1,8-12) with no ASAuthorizationAppleID equivalent offered, and no exempt case applies (this is a consumer recipe app, not enterprise/marketplace).
Pierre: Apple requires that any third-party social login (Google, Facebook, etc.) used to set up a primary account be paired with an equivalent privacy-preserving option, and Sign in with Apple is the simplest way to satisfy that. LoginView.swift only implements GIDSignIn with no fallback and description.txt even markets "One-tap Google sign-in" as a feature, so no exemption (own-account system, enterprise, marketplace, citizen ID, third-party client) applies here. Add a Sign in with Apple button alongside Google Sign-In before submission.
